meta_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Stop watching tutorials and start shipping. Learn how to use Git with AI, Antigravity, and Claude Code to build your MVP faster and escape tutorial hell.
content.answer_block: Escape tutorial hell by shifting from passive consumption to active version-controlled iteration. By integrating Git with AI agents like Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform documentation into actionable code commits. This workflow forces MVP validation, ensures modular progress, and builds a professional, production-ready codebase while you learn by shipping.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks watching YouTube tutorials, collecting bookmarks, and feeling the phantom productivity of 'learning.' Yet, your production folder remains empty. Tutorial hell is a silent killer for founders; it masks procrastination as education, delaying your market entry while your competitors ship features.

The antidote isn't another course—it's a fundamental shift in how you interact with your codebase. By leveraging AI-driven Git workflows, you bridge the gap between abstract concepts and functional deployment. We move from watching to building, using Git as your ledger and AI as your pair programmer to force momentum.

steps.title: Initialize Your Product Foundation
steps.description: Before writing code, establish a clean Git environment. This step creates the separation between your project's logic and the AI's suggestions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a professional SaaS project structure using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Create a clean folder hierarchy that follows industry best practices for a scalable MVP.

steps.title: Define the MVP Feature Scope
steps.description: Stop guessing what to build. Use AI to translate your product vision into a technical specification document within your repo.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a technical PRD for a subscription-based SaaS MVP. Break down the features into small, atomic tasks that can be completed in 30-minute sessions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Draft a technical spec for the user auth module and save to specs/auth.md'

steps.title: Iterative Implementation with Context
steps.description: Use Claude Code to execute specific tasks from your PRD. Ensure every change is tracked as a distinct Git commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the Supabase authentication flow based on the spec in specs/auth.md. Write unit tests for each function and ensure clean error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement auth logic; verify tests pass; commit changes with a descriptive message'

steps.title: Refactor and Optimize
steps.description: AI is excellent at identifying technical debt. Use it to audit your code against best practices before pushing to main.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks. Suggest refactors for the database queries to improve latency.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze the current codebase for performance issues and suggest a refactor plan'

steps.title: Automated Documentation and Deployment
steps.description: Finalize your build by generating documentation for your future self and preparing for production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a professional README.md that explains how to set up the environment, run migrations, and deploy to Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate deployment documentation and update the README'

pro_tips: Always commit after every single AI interaction to maintain a clear 'git log' of your product's evolution.
Use AI to generate unit tests before writing the actual implementation logic to enforce TDD (Test Driven Development).
Treat your '.claude' configuration as part of your IP; refine the instructions to match your specific coding style.
When the AI hits a roadblock, ask it to 'explain the error in the context of the current git branch' to force it to analyze your state.
Use branching strategies (e.g., feature/auth-flow) to keep your main branch deployable at all times.
resources: Git Best Practices for SaaS: https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to a staging environment (like Vercel or Railway) and share the link with three potential users for immediate feedback.
content.conversion_block: Don't let your idea die in a tutorial playlist. Harness the power of AI-assisted Git to turn your vision into a live, revenue-generating product today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
